name: BaseConvo_Reconnaisance
_source: s;JudahShirtless;{tgm}.....|{c:e;JudahShirtless;HalfCloseEyes}{tgm}Why do I have the feeling I'm being watched?|{c:e;JudahShirtless;CloseEyes}Whatever.{c:e;JudahShirtless;NormalBlink} Bath's done. Time to go.

s;Felicity;Yup, he's clean.{w}{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes} In more ways than one.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink}No signs of Circ's influence on him,|but I still should make sure he doesn't do anything to Krista.|{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes}*sigh* I just wish this recon mission didn't have to involve seeing him naked.|{c:e;Felicity;HalfCloseEyes}Ugh, now I need a bath too.
